title: Generate a report of all tasks completed by an individual
excerpt: I would love to have a way to generate a report of all the tasks I’ve completed in a given timeframe (week, month, year, custom). The report would show every task that was assigned to me and has a status of completed wit…

posts.author: js295 (Jessica)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to have a way to generate a report of all the tasks I’ve completed in a given timeframe (week, month, year, custom). The report would show every task that was assigned to me and has a status of completed within the timeframe selected.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @js295

We developed an app called Board Report Automations that provides reporting capabilities which are based on actual reports (static docs) and not dashboards. It allows to solve this exact case. Here’s an example →

Screenshot 2024-02-21 at 18.09.172118×530 28.8 KB

These reports are sent via monday.com notification & email and can also solves a bunch of other cases but I’ll let you find those out
You can find it in the monday.com marketplace within the platform or here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Hope that helps!

posts.author: js295 (Jessica)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for letting me know about this option. I still prefer to have a built-in option that is native to Monday.com and free, but this is a great stopgap solution in the meantime.
